title: ReproStim: Video Capture and Recording Suite for Neuroimaging and Psychology Experiments
description: ReproStim is a video capture and recording suite for neuroimaging and psychology experiments. It provides automated capture of audio-visual stimuli as presented to experimental subjects, storing recordings alongside behavioral or neuroimaging data in BIDS-compliant datasets.
